title: Functions, Transformations, Inverses, and Composition · Quantity Clinic: Inverse Functions
summary: Model sensor calibration and reversible conversions across representations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int inverse functions increment in a calibration and conversion library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Construct and validate inverses under one-to-one domain restrictions.
Predict how translations, scaling, reflection, and composition change a model.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
